overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through an industrial district during a severe sandstorm. The scene features heavy orange atmospheric haze, towering industrial structures, overhead power lines, and scattered pedestrians navigating the low-visibility conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street beneath overpass during sandstorm

events.description: vehicle with headlights on approaches through the haze and passes by on the left
passing the initial traffic light pole and moving beyond the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sandstorm following a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking ahead on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: large industrial overpass structure with red warning lights along the upper edge spanning the street
tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights visible through the haze
metal security fence with barbed wire running along the right side of the street
large industrial structure with pipes and scaffolding visible through the dust

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive industrial overpass with red warning lights, walking through heavy orange haze. The camera follows pedestrians along an asphalt street bordered by industrial buildings and security fencing, as a vehicle passes through the low-visibility conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with security fencing and palm trees

events.description: passing a wrecked abandoned car with open doors on the right curb

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past industrial buildings and occasional palm trees

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead in the distance through the haze

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible through the orange haze on the left sidewalk
damaged abandoned vehicle with open doors and debris around it
dense network of electrical cables and industrial pylons spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the industrial sidewalk with a chain-link fence on the right and palm trees visible through the haze on the left. The segment features passing a wrecked car on the curb while overhead power lines crisscross the orange sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk and towering industrial structures

events.description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the wide intersection
traffic light changes from green to red while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians while navigating through light traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection with headlights piercing the haze

entered.detail: zebra crossing markings on the asphalt at the intersection
enormous industrial tower with cylindrical structure dominating the skyline ahead
traffic signal pole at the intersection showing green then changing to red

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with a crosswalk, where the crowd density increases. The camera crosses the street while a dark sedan drives through the haze, and the massive cylindrical tower looms larger in the background. The traffic light changes from green to red during the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive industrial tower and overhead infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the massive tower against the stormy orange sky

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering industrial structure while standing near a parked vehicle

entered.detail: stationary car parked on the right side of the street near the curb
metal framework structure attached to the industrial building on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the massive cylindrical tower as the camera tilts upward to emphasize its scale against the stormy orange sky. Standing near a parked vehicle, the view reveals the dense network of overhead power lines and industrial scaffolding surrounding the towering structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a suffocating industrial haze that gradually opens up to reveal the overwhelming scale of a monolithic tower. It begins beneath a massive overpass illuminated by red warning lights, moving past pedestrians and security fencing along an asphalt street shrouded in orange fog. As the camera progresses along the sidewalk, it passes a wrecked car and palm trees obscured by the storm, while a dense network of power lines begins to crisscross the sky above. The scene then expands into a wide, crowded intersection where the camera crosses the street amidst passing traffic and a shifting signal light, bringing a massive cylindrical tower into clearer view. Finally, the camera tilts upward from a parked vehicle to emphasize the towering structure and its surrounding industrial scaffolding against the stormy orange horizon.
